title: Better Nether Portal
description: Tired of the very prominent texture of the nether portal? This resource pack will completely rework its texture by adding a cool frame and increasing transparency.
body:
# Better Nether Portal
Tired of the very prominent texture of the nether portal? This resource pack will completely rework its texture.
The portal now does not have a spinning texture that is repeated on each block. It is now a purple frame encased in obsidian. The frame has pulsating animation and the portal itself has become more transparent. The frame has no size limitation. It is adapting to the size of the portal.


![view_of_frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c3d7e8c68d1b74728d9f654a93bdf893eb825b1.png)

# Important!!!
### For the resource pack to work, you need Continuity mod! If this mod is not installed, the resource pack will not work _(the portal texture will simply be solid purple)_. You can also use Optifine to run the resource pack, but compatibility is not guaranteed.
